digit_entry_note: NJ-1040 uses single-character text widgets for monetary amounts. Each line has 8-11 individual cells arranged left-to-right. The last 2 cells are cents; the preceding cells are dollar digits (right-aligned, zero-padded). Lines with 11 cells have a leading sign/indicator cell at position 0.

line_15_gross_income.note: NJ Gross Income (line 15) — maps to state_adjusted_gross_income

line_27_nj_taxable_income.note: NJ Taxable Income (line 27) — maps to state_taxable_income. First cell (263) is sign indicator.

line_29_tax.note: Tax from table or rate schedule (line 29). First cell (270) is sign indicator.

line_37_total_tax.note: Total NJ Income Tax (line 37) — maps to state_total_tax. Only 3 cells available on this shared row.

line_53_balance_due.note: Balance due (line 53). First 2 cells are code indicator fields.
